name: bethesdasearch-site
description: Static-site build for hosts that deploy from the repo root (e.g. Dappling Network). Assembles the frontend/ SPA into ./dist.

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && mkdir -p dist && cp frontend/index.html frontend/styles.css frontend/app.js frontend/config.js frontend/favicon.svg dist/ && echo 'Built static site into ./dist'
